title: hieracium pyrenaicum subsp. bartlingii
intro: Hieracium pyrenaicum subsp. bartlingii is a subspecies of the Hieracium pyrenaicum plant, a perennial herb belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Hieracium pyrenaicum subsp. bartlingii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
